findings.message: New settings field `widget_timeout_s` is consumed via the `APP_` prefix (i.e. `APP_WIDGET_TIMEOUT_S`) but is not declared in `.env.example`. A variable consumed in config/settings.py with no corresponding `.env.example` entry breaks the documented env surface and DEV->CI->STAGE->PROD parity: operators have no signal that this knob exists or how to set it per environment.
findings.suggestion: Add `APP_WIDGET_TIMEOUT_S=5.0` (with a short comment) to `.env.example`, below the FRAMEWORK markers, so the consumed variable is declared on the documented environment surface.
